body.title: Fix stale levers doc path in sprint-ticket skill
body.result: updated step 12.5 to point to docs/the_ownership_gap/4.Skills.md (canonical levers doc)
body.intention: I intend that sprint-ticket step 12.5 points at the canonical levers doc so the post-sprint check actually opens the right file.
body.description:
sprint-ticket/SKILL.md step 12.5 references `docs/Deterministic_AI_Development_Levers_A_layer_on_top_of_skills.md` (old flat path). The canonical levers content now lives at `docs/the_ownership_gap/4.Skills.md`. The old file still exists so no hard failure, but any post-sprint update lands in the wrong place.

**Affected files:** `~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md` (step 12.5), `skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md` in repo (installer source)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Update the path reference in step 12.5 only. Do not merge or delete the old file — that is a separate cleanup decision.
**Completion criteria:** `grep 'Deterministic_AI_Development_Levers' ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md` returns no matches; `grep 'the_ownership_gap/4.Skills' ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md` returns the updated line.
